user.title: Eufy Robomow — Sign in
user.description: Sign in with your Eufy account to discover your mower and unlock all cloud-managed settings (edge distance, path distance, travel speed, blade speed, pad direction).

device.title: Eufy Robomow — Select mower
device.description: Found {device_count} device(s) in your account. Select your mower and enter its local IP address (check your router's DHCP table if unsure).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the mower. Check the IP address and make sure it is on WiFi.
error.invalid_auth: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
error.no_devices: No compatible devices found in this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
